canonical_truth.summary: An unusual, specific hunger arrived mid-morning — sharper and more directed than typical. The squirrel brain registered something in the ambient signal and misrouted it as appetite. The east cache was avoided. Foraging went west into unfamiliar territory.
canonical_truth.concrete_outcome: YY foraged west, found a new food source, ate partially

perception_prompt.noticeable_surface: The hunger arrived with unusual specificity. Not the usual slow graying-out — a signal. Something about the word Hungary had been in the noise. The squirrel brain doesn't always sort these carefully.

schema_patch.reason: source_event field did not exist at time of original creation

authorial_note.real_world_inspiration: Hungary votes out Orbán — the word 'Hungary' arrives in ambient signal and is misrouted as appetite
authorial_note.translation_logic: The word 'Hungary' arrives in the world's signal and gets misrouted — YY doesn't know why they're suddenly 25% more hungry, only that they are; cache avoidance from Day 2 sends the foraging outward into new territory
authorial_note.restraint_reason: The wordplay causation stays entirely implicit — YY never knows why the hunger was specific, only that it was
